[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [fonts](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeFont](../../TextmodeFont.md) / dispose

# Method: dispose()

```ts
dispose(): void;
```

Dispose of all resources used by this font manager.

## Returns

`void`
